title: Alt Surface Navigation
description:
Alt Surface Navigation

Advanced 3D Viewport Navigation for Blender

Transform your Blender 3D navigation experience with Alt Surface Navigation, a powerful addon that provides intuitive surface-based viewport controls.

This complete navigation solution allows you to orbit, zoom, and pan around any surface point in your 3D scene with precision and ease.


✨ Key Features

  • Surface-Based Navigation – Navigate around actual surface hit points rather than arbitrary viewport centers

  • Intuitive Controls – Simple Alt + Mouse combinations for all navigation operations

  • Smart Hit Detection – Configurable detection modes for all objects, selected objects, or visible objects

  • Precision Zoom – Adjustable sensitivity and distance limits for perfect control

  • Cursor Integration – Optional 3D cursor positioning during operations

  • Threshold Control – Prevents jittery navigation with hit point update thresholds



🎮 Navigation Controls

  • Alt + Left Click → Orbit around surface hit points

  • Alt + Right Click → Zoom centered on surface locations

  • Alt + Middle Click → Pan based on surface reference points

⚙️ Customizable Settings

  • Zoom sensitivity adjustment (0.001 – 0.1 range)

  • Minimum and maximum zoom distance limits

  • Hit point detection modes and update thresholds

  • Cursor display options during operations

  • Restore behavior on Alt key release

📌 Perfect For

  • Detailed modeling and sculpting work

  • Architectural visualization

  • Character modeling and animation

  • Any workflow requiring precise 3D navigation


🔧 Integration & Compatibility

  • Seamlessly integrates into Blender’s 3D viewport

  • Dedicated settings panel in the Tool category

  • All settings accessible with a reset-to-defaults option

  • Compatible with Blender 3.0+

  • Designed for professional workflows

🚀 Installation

  1. Install the addon file in Blender

  2. Navigation controls are immediately available – no complex setup required

  3. Start navigating with surface precision right away
documentation:
Alt Surface Navigation (Complete) - Advanced 3D Viewport Navigation for Blender
Transform your Blender 3D navigation experience with Alt Surface Navigation, a powerful addon that provides intuitive surface-based viewport controls. This complete navigation solution allows you to orbit, zoom, and pan around any surface point in your 3D scene with precision and ease.
KEY FEATURES:

  • Surface-Based Navigation: Navigate around actual surface hit points rather than arbitrary viewport centers
  • Intuitive Controls: Simple Alt+Mouse combinations for all navigation operations
  • Smart Hit Detection: Configurable detection modes for all objects, selected objects, or visible objects
  • Precision Zoom: Adjustable sensitivity and distance limits for perfect control
  • Cursor Integration: Optional 3D cursor positioning during operations
  • Threshold Control: Prevents jittery navigation with hit point update thresholds

NAVIGATION CONTROLS:
- Alt+Left Click: Orbit around surface hit points
- Alt+Right Click: Zoom centered on surface locations
- Alt+Middle Click: Pan based on surface reference points
CUSTOMIZABLE SETTINGS:

  • Zoom sensitivity adjustment (0.001 - 0.1 range)
  • Minimum and maximum zoom distance limits
  • Hit point detection modes and update thresholds
  • Cursor display options during operations
  • Restore behavior on Alt key release

PERFECT FOR:
- Detailed modeling and sculpting work
- Architectural visualization
- Character modeling and animation
- Any workflow requiring precise 3D navigation
The addon integrates seamlessly into Blender's 3D viewport with a dedicated settings panel in the Tool category. All settings are easily accessible and can be reset to defaults with one click.
Compatible with Blender 3.0+ and designed for professional workflows. Whether you're a beginner learning 3D navigation or a professional seeking more precise viewport control, Alt Surface Navigation provides the tools you need for efficient 3D work.
Installation is simple - just install the addon file and the navigation controls are immediately available. No complex setup required - start navigating with surface precision right away.
Take your Blender navigation to the next level with Alt Surface Navigation - where every click counts and every surface matters.
